title: Scleroptychis cretica
taxonomy: Scleroptychis cretica is classified as a genus and species of flowering plant in the family Restionaceae. This plant is native to the Mediterranean region and is part of the Restionaceae family which includes over 1,000 species. Scleroptychis cretica is further classified as a member of the order Poales, which comprises grasses and sedges, among other flowering plant families. Within the Poales order, it belongs to the subclass commelinids, which is a group of flowering plants that also includes the families Poaceae and Cyperaceae. The exact classification of Scleroptychis cretica is as follows: kingdom: Plantae, clade: angiosperms, clade: monocots, order: Poales, family: Restionaceae, genus: Scleroptychis, species: S. cretica.
